more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.description: THE High Court of Zimbabwe has temporarily halted the rape trial of Prophetic Healing and Deliverance (PHD) Ministries founder Walter Magaya, which was set to proceed at the magistrate’s court. more.title: Is Zimbabwe Ready for the Next Wave of Industrial Automation?
more.description: For decades, automation in manufacturing evolved slowly. more.description: Six-time Grammy winner Dionne Warwick has announced her final studio album titled “DWuets”.
